loci.statement: Engineering is closing out the LTMi-XT v0.1 release this week.
Two senior engineers have been hired against the implementation backlog.
The HR review cycle starts on October 14 and runs for three weeks.
Salary bands are being adjusted across all engineering levels.
Marketing is launching the lead leak scanner campaign with three paid placements.
Customer ops reports 251 active DiagBuddy users.
Customer ops reports roughly 3000 diagnoses logged in the platform.
Stripe billing is live for DiagBuddy with two pricing tiers.

breadcrumb: Grandfathered tier at $20 per month is locked for users who signed up before February 15 2026.
loci.statement: The grandfathered tier at $20 per month is locked for users who signed up before February 15 2026.

breadcrumb: The standard tier is $34.99 per month.
loci.statement: The standard tier is $34.99 per month.

breadcrumb: Finance reports cash on hand sufficient for 14 months at current burn.
loci.statement: Finance reports cash on hand sufficient for 14 months at current burn.

breadcrumb: The board meeting is scheduled for October 30.
loci.statement: The board meeting is scheduled for October 30.

breadcrumb: The customer ops lead must publish the diagnostic accuracy review before October 22.
loci.statement: The customer ops lead must publish the diagnostic accuracy review before October 22.

breadcrumb: The marketing director must finalize the lead leak campaign creative by October 18.
loci.statement: The marketing director must finalize the lead leak campaign creative by October 18.

breadcrumb: The engineering lead must publish the LTMi-XT benchmark report by October 25.
loci.statement: The engineering lead must publish the LTMi-XT benchmark report by October 25.
